div.div:
Traffic Flow: ❶ DNS resolves api.internal.example.com → ILB IP (10.100.0.10) ❷ Route via BGP ❸ HA VPN tunnel ❹ Workloads VPC router ❺ ILB → URL Map → Serverless NEG ❻ NEG selects backend ❼ Cloud Run service
Pros: Full traffic control, path-based routing, Cloud Armor, TLS termination, custom domains
Cons: VPN tunnel dependency, ILB management overhead, regional (ILB per region)
